head.hi: The Secretary of State to the American Group

div.p: Gentlemen: The Department acknowledges the receipt of your letter of May 18, 1921, with reference to the decision of the American Group approving the proposed formation of a council to consider Consortium matters.

The Department would like to know whether this proposal has met the approval of all of the Groups. It is noted that in the telegram from Mr. Lamont to you of May 14,See telegram no. 332, May 14, from the Ambassador in France, p. 365. transmitted to you by the Department on May 17, 1921,Letter of May 17 not printed. the matter was to be submitted to the Japanese Group representative in London.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
F. M. Dearing
Assistant Secretary
